summary: Excellent matrix recording captures a fire‑filled show highlighted by a soaring Bird Song, blistering Scarlet Fire jam and a memorable Stir It Up segment.
review: The performance is hailed as one of the strongest post‑coma first sets ever, with Jerry’s incendiary “Scarlet Fire” and an 18‑minute transcendental Bird Song leading the way, while the second set delivers tight post‑drum energy and a unique Stir It Up jam.  Mr. Seamons’ immersive matrix mix is described as flawless – clear, balanced and full of ambience – making this release a must‑listen for any Deadhead.

ai_rating.rationale: All four reviewers give high marks (average 4.75 stars) and praise both the musical performance and the flawless matrix recording, providing detailed, consistent positive feedback.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Immersive matrix mix praised as perfect – clear, balanced with no vocal, lyrical, or tone issues; listeners note the recording captures the venue ambience without any drop‑outs.

show_quality.setlist_flow: First set described as a tight, relaxed yet rocking masterpiece; second set maintains momentum with strong post‑drum playing and a memorable jam sequence.

band_member_comments.Jerry: His guitar work is described as "fiery" and central to the Scarlet Fire jam and the overall high‑energy vibe.
band_member_comments.Keys: Bruce’s melodic comping and Vince’s tasteful coloring are highlighted as perfectly fitting their roles.
band_member_comments.Drums: Post‑drum segment is called "very strong" with tight, energetic playing.
